Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to inform email content.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly highlights gaps in coverage that would otherwise require tedious manual cross-referencing, enabling faster sourcing and sales decisions.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark a formatted Excel file attachment showing DFC's stocked parts and identified inventory gaps for the requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a ready-to-use catalog output directly to Mark's inbox, eliminating back-and-forth with internal teams to compile the same information.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report by appending the live Dream inventory fields to each line item and flagging parts with no inventory source as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a fully enriched, actionable document that shows not just what's backordered but what can actually be resolved.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered parts, pre-populated with the live status details for each affected order.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual drafting of customer update emails, ensuring timely, consistent communication without burdening the team with repetitive writing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all listed two-piece rotor products.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor and supplier catalog data automatically, replacing what would otherwise be days of manual cross-catalog research.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts inventory to identify which applications DFC already covers and which represent gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive offerings and where there are unaddressed market opportunities worth pursuing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers asking about their demand for specific two-piece rotor applications identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal from customers at scale without requiring the sales team to manually contact each account.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Outputs the final formatted reference sheet for Dino combining the competitor fitment data, DFC coverage status, gap analysis, and collected customer demand responses.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, organized decision-ready document that enables Dino to prioritize new product development with both market and customer data in one place.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — across every live campaign.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full universe of active ad copy in one pull, making it possible to audit at scale rather than reviewing ads one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all pulled ad copy for specific flagged phrases and identifies the exact ad, field, and copy string where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a problematic phrase across hundreds of ads instantly, eliminating manual review that could take hours and risk missing matches.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured email report listing every flagged ad with the specific phrase matched, the field it appeared in, and the full copy for context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable compliance or quality report directly to the requester with no additional formatting work required.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and triggers the workflow for each new submission.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or left unprocessed, creating a reliable intake pipeline that operates continuously without manual inbox monitoring.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive organized by applicant name and application date for reliable record-keeping.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a permanent, searchable archive of all applicant documents that HR can reference at any time without hunting through email threads.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume, scores it against the qualifications of open roles, and produces a hiring recommendation with a rationale categorized as approved, denied, or paused.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts initial resume screening time dramatically, allowing the team to focus only on candidates who meet the bar rather than reviewing every submission manually.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant's name, role, score, decision, and Drive file link to a master dashboard, with paused-role candidates automatically routed to a separate Pending tab, while Gmail sends auto-replies to denied and no-resume applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives hiring managers a real-time, organized view of the full applicant pipeline and ensures every candidate receives a timely response without manual follow-up.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents across the board — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, our in-progress agents continue to move forward in development and our completed agents are actively running and delivering value across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, support, and more. Great momentum heading into the weeks ahead as we work toward getting those 18 planned agents off the ground!
